use_cases: Interactive hero section background with mouse-reactive ripple effects
Ambient canvas animation for landing pages and portfolios
Visual effect overlay for creative and media applications
Decorative WebGL shader background for SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A Three.js WebGL shader component creating a celestial ink effect with noise-based fractal brownian motion (fbm) and mouse-reactive ripples. Features a rotating animation with gradient aesthetics rendered via custom GLSL fragment shaders. Delivered as a self-contained React component using useEffect for Three.js initialization and cleanup.
